caption: A person holds a clear plastic card protector in front of a desk, showcasing a collectible card. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt with a yellow logo sits behind a setup featuring a computer monitor and a small white device. The desk is covered with a surface featuring green palm tree graphics. The orange and white logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are prominently displayed on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the person moves the plastic protector, shifting the angle of the card inside to show its reflective surface and a signature. The man in the background remains seated, looking toward the card and interacting with the scene. The movement of the protector reveals a gold-bordered card with a dark signature across the front.
